death.attack.acid_rain.player: %1$s was melted by acid rain whilst trying to escape %2$s
death.attack.cryo_fuel.player: %1$s became an ice cube whilst trying to escape %2$s
death.attack.oxygen.player: %1$s lost their breath whilst trying to escape %2$s
death.attack.rocket_flames.player: %1$s melted under an active rocket whilst trying to escape %2$s
info.ad_astra.cable: Transfers energy. Right-click with a wrench to change the distribution mode.
info.ad_astra.cable_duct: Works like cables, but fully-conceals oxygen, preventing leaks.
info.ad_astra.coal_generator: The simplest of generators. Generates energy from burnable materials.
info.ad_astra.cryo_freezer: Converts ice materials into cryo fuel.
info.ad_astra.energizer: Stores a large amount of energy. Right-click with an item to charge it. Retains its charge when broken.
info.ad_astra.etrionic_blast_furnace: Smelts ores into ingots like a blast furnace, but uses energy and has 4 slots. Has two modes: blasting and alloying.
info.ad_astra.etrionic_capacitor: Stores energy. Right-click to toggle. Shift-right-click to change the distribution mode.
info.ad_astra.flag: A flag with your face on it. Right-click to add an image from a URL.
info.ad_astra.fluid_duct: Works like fluid pipes, but fully-conceals oxygen, preventing leaks.
info.ad_astra.fluid_pipe: Transfers fluids. Right-click with a wrench to change the distribution mode.
info.ad_astra.gas_tank: Stores fluids and gases. Right-click to distribute into your inventory.
info.ad_astra.globe: Right-click to spin the globe. Power it with redstone to make it constantly spin.
info.ad_astra.gravity_normalizer: Allows you to control gravity in the local area. Should be used in a completely sealed structure.
info.ad_astra.jet_suit: Works like the Netherite Space Suit, with jets installed to propel the wearer forward with extreme force.
info.ad_astra.launch_pad: Launches rockets. Power with redstone to automatically launch placed rockets.
info.ad_astra.netherite_space_suit: Works like the Space Suit, with the added advantage of protecting the wearer from extreme heat.
info.ad_astra.oxygen_distributor: Distributes oxygen and regulates the temperature. Use it to create livable environments. Should be used in a completely sealed structure.
info.ad_astra.oxygen_loader: Converts water into oxygen. Use it to fill up space suits and gas tanks.
info.ad_astra.oxygen_sensor: Emits a redstone signal when oxygen is detected. shift-right-click to invert the signal. Right-click to change what it detects.
info.ad_astra.rocket: A rocket used for interplanetary travel. Must be placed on a launch pad. Shift-right-click to access its fuel and inventory.
info.ad_astra.rover: An all-terrain vehicle. Shift-right-click to access its inventory. Click on the screen to access the rover's radio. This radio can play real radio stations.
info.ad_astra.sliding_door: A large 3x3 door. Shift-right-click with a wrench to lock it. Locked doors can only be opened with redstone.
info.ad_astra.solar_panel: Generates energy from the sun during the day. Note that the energy generated is dependent on the planet.
info.ad_astra.space_suit: Supplies the wearer with oxygen and protects them from the extreme-cold of space.
info.ad_astra.ti_69: Displays local oxygen, temperature, and gravity information.
info.ad_astra.water_pump: Pumps water. Ensure a water source is below the pump for it to function.
info.ad_astra.wrench: Used to configure pipes and various other blocks.
info.ad_astra.zip_gun: Propels you forward. Use a second one in your offhand to propel even further. Excellent for maneuvering in zero-gravity.
